manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

marine

Related words are:

- aquatic
- nautical
- oceangoing

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe the word "marine" without using:
- marine
- aquatic
- nautical
- oceangoing

I should think of what "marine" means - it relates to the sea/ocean. I could mention:
- Related to the sea/ocean
- Could refer to soldiers who serve on ships
- Could be an adjective describing things of the sea

Let me give a short, direct clue:

"Related to the sea or ocean"

Wait, but I need to be careful not to use the related words. Let me think of other approaches:
- "Soldiers who serve at sea"
- "Biology term for sea life"
- "Relating to the sea"

I'll go with a simple description about the sea/ocean connection.

content.text: CLUE: Relating to the sea or ocean; also a type of military servicemember

clem_player.response: CLUE: Relating to the sea or ocean; also a type of military servicemember

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: Relating to the sea or ocean; also a type of military servicemember

content.thinking:
The clue mentions two things:
1. Relating to the sea or ocean
2. A type of military servicemember

The word that fits both of these definitions is "MARINE" - it can be an adjective relating to the sea/ocean (marine life, marine biology) and it's also a military servicemember (a Marine, as in the Marine Corps).

This seems like a clear answer.
